title: Lock Filtered Board Views to prevent people from deleting/overwriting a view
excerpt:
working on building a handful of saved views for our super board to help narrow down a couple specific workflows. 
pro: views are saved across our organization so we can set up a couple workflows that should work for eve…

posts.author: uubee (William Booker)
posts.cookedHtml:
working on building a handful of saved views for our super board to help narrow down a couple specific workflows.

pro: views are saved across our organization so we can set up a couple workflows that should work for everyone.
con: it is way too easy for someone to add/remove a filter and overwrite the saved view for everyone else.

is there a way to lock down a saved view for the team on a specific board so they can add filters for themselves (ie search for themselves to see what is assigned to them) but won’t wreck the saved view for everyone else?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
15 posts were merged into an existing topic: Set default views for all users and hide main table view

19 votes have been moved. 10 votes could not be moved because their users already voted in the other topic.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We sincerely apologise for the delay in responding to this thread! We are working on improving our responsiveness to the community, particularly our feature request process so appreciate your patience in advance!

On that note, as we pull together all the votes associated with this topic, we would love if you can redirect the votes on this thread, to the primary thread (most voted) here: Set default views for all users and hide main table view - as we plan to close this smaller thread in an attempt to consolidate all votes, and better prioritise this feature request based upon the total amount of votes

Thank you!
